arguments.prompt:
Create a photoreal 9:16 luxury cosmetics commercial storyboard frame.

Use the attached source image only as a composition and camera-layout guide.
Preserve the framing, object placement, scale relationship, product silhouette, negative space, and motion intention.
Do not preserve low-poly geometry, viewport lighting, temporary materials, flat shaders, gray background, cheap CG render look, drawn rings, floating dots, or graphic line overlays.

The output must look like a polished live-action / premium product photography storyboard still, not a 3D render.
No readable text, no real brand logos, no third-party packaging, no unsupported claims.

Dark opening key visual: a black lacquer lipstick silhouette stands in a deep black premium studio, with champagne-gold metal barely revealed by warm rim light. Use shallow depth of field, real material reflections, soft glints, subtle volumetric haze, controlled lens bloom, and a quiet high-brand beauty campaign mood.

No person, no hand, no readable brand text, no real logo, no graphic overlay, no UI look.

execution: Run this with the Higgsfield MCP tool exposed by the host agent. Save the sanitized MCP response to output_log.
security_note: Do not save API keys, cookies, sessions, tokens, payment data, or raw browser storage.
